postgres.description: Read-only Postgres access for Architect/Analyst agents. Schema exploration, query generation.

filesystem.description: Scoped filesystem access to project root only.

playwright.description: Browser automation for QA agent — E2E smoke tests, visual regressions.

github-actions.description: Расширенный GitHub MCP с actions:write scope. Параллельно с базовым harness-MCP — даёт workflow_dispatch для timeweb-manage.yml (server-status, server-logs, disk-cleanup), trigger deploy.yml, etc. Tools под namespace mcp__github-actions__*. Требует PAT в env (см. AGENTS.md → MCP servers).
